news_items.headline: D-backs enjoy Walker Buehler’s Off-Day
news_items.summary: Record: 45-45. Pace: 81-81. Change on 2025: +1. The Diamondbacks jumped on Padres starter Walker Buehler early. They scored six runs in the first three innings, and despite this being a Brandon Pfaadt start, were just able to hold on for victory. The win put Arizona back in sole possession of second place in the […]

news_items.headline: Well, We Scored (And Still Lost)
news_items.summary: Jays 1 Giants 10 I don’t know…. At least in the past we were able to make the easy defensive plays. But tonight, we couldn’t even do that. Andrés Giménez made an error. Kazuma Okamoto made an official, had another that should have been an error and made a lousy play on a throw into […]

news_items.headline: 'Gutsy' win at Braves returns Mets to Citi Field with momentum after series split
news_items.summary: Monday's 7-6 win at the Braves saw the Mets escape Truist Park with a split of the four-game series after New York overcame Atlanta in 10 innings, led by clutch moments from Juan Soto and Luis Torrens, among others.
